74713.subject: Coinbase Goes Full-Stack Broker With AI Advisor and Options
74713.body:
**gm, Defiers!**

* **[Coinbase](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/coinbase-system-update-sec-registered-ai-advisor-stock-options-brokerage-push)**[ adds AI advisor, stock options, full brokerage stack](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/coinbase-system-update-sec-registered-ai-advisor-stock-options-brokerage-push)

* [**ZetaChain**](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=7a67ac5e61582435aeff86958cea26f421ef9fc5)[ bets on private AI [partner]](https://thedefiant.io/news/blockchains/your-ai-knows-everything-about-you-zetachain-bets-on-private-ai?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=7a67ac5e61582435aeff86958cea26f421ef9fc5)

* **[Kalshi](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-eyes-broader-asset-classes-perpetual-futures-55b-crypto-launch)**[ eyes broader assets after $5.5B regulated-perps launch](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/kalshi-eyes-broader-asset-classes-perpetual-futures-55b-crypto-launch)

* **[Litecoin ETF](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/litecoin-spot-etf-9m-altcoin-etf-era-demand-thesis-ece431)**[ sits at $9M, testing the altcoin-ETF demand thesis](https://thedefiant.io/news/markets/litecoin-spot-etf-9m-altcoin-etf-era-demand-thesis-ece431)

* **[Zama, Morpho, Steakhouse](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/zama-morpho-steakhouse-confidential-usdc-yield-vault-ethereum)**[ open confidential USDC yield vault](https://thedefiant.io/news/defi/zama-morpho-steakhouse-confidential-usdc-yield-vault-ethereum)

* **[Illinois](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/illinois-strictest-digital-asset-tax-sb3019-cci-veto)**[ enacts the strictest US digital-asset tax](https://thedefiant.io/news/regulation/illinois-strictest-digital-asset-tax-sb3019-cci-veto)

* [**AetherStrike**](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=b1f6d429ea7bcbffe63ba977ec5acce634845b1c)[ tokenizes material holding US infra together [partner]](https://thedefiant.io/education/research-and-opinion/the-material-holding-america-together-is-disappearing-aetherstrike-tokenized-it?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=kraken-and-coinbase-bring-perps-onshore-as-btc-tops-67k-intraday&_bhlid=b1f6d429ea7bcbffe63ba977ec5acce634845b1c)

Coinbase used its quarterly [System Update to roll out an SEC-registered AI investment advisor, stock and ETF trading on its professional platform, and options markets for both equities and crypto](https://thedefiant.io/news/cefi/coinbase-system-update-sec-registered-ai-advisor-stock-options-brokerage-push); all on a single US-regulated venue. The bundle
